title: Customizable unlock wipe times
description: Allow users to configure any custom time length for unlock wipe timeout, not just the hardcoded preset values (7, 14, 30, 60, 90 days). This would provide more flexibility for users with specific security requirements.

title: Fix nix build for reproducible APK builds
description: Update the nix flake configuration to properly support 'nix build' for reproducible APK builds. Currently the gradle2nix integration needs refinement to work correctly with the Android SDK setup and gradle dependencies.
